response:
TEMPERATURE RISES AS SEAS SHINE AND SUNSETS SEEM SO SLOW.
STARS SPARKLE SOFTLY IN THE SKY ABOVE US ALL.
SAND STRETCHES SO FAR AND SO WIDE.
SEA SALT SPRAYS ONTO THE SHORES.
SUNLIGHT SHINES SO STRONGLY ON THE SURFACE.
SHADOWS SHIFT AS THE DAY GOES BY.
SILENT WINDS SWEEP ACROSS THE LAND.
SWEET SOUNDS OF WAVES CRASH AGAINST THE ROCKS.
SILVER MOON SOON RISES TO LIGHT THE NIGHT.
STARS STILL SHINE BRIGHT IN THE DARK.
SOFT BREEZES BLOW GENTLY THROUGH THE TREES.
ROLL THE DICE TO SEE WHAT HAPPENS NEXT.
